howItWorks.intro: This drip irrigation flow calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Total Flow
rules.explanation: Sum of all emitter flow rates gives total system demand.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What flow rate should I use?
faq.a: 0.5-1 GPH for most plants, 2-4 GPH for trees and large shrubs.

faq.q: How long should I run drip irrigation?
faq.a: 20-45 minutes for most gardens, depending on soil type and plant needs.

howWeCalculate.intro: This drip irrigation flow calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
